info.description: Two images side by side. Useful for before/after, two angles of the same place, or two related products. Stacks vertically on mobile.

heading.description: Optional heading above both images. Leave blank for plain images with no title.

image_left.description: Left image. Same aspect ratio as right image gives the cleanest look (both portrait, or both landscape).

caption_left.description: Optional small caption under the left image. Example: 'Boat exterior'. Leave blank to hide.

caption_right.description: Optional small caption under the right image. Example: 'Boat interior'.

style.description: Optional background colour, padding, max width for this section.
